description: SpellVisualEffectName.Type says how a visual effect-name resolves to a model. Types 0/1/2 come from WoWDBDefs; 3-10 were absent there and decoded (Task D), later confirmed by wowdev.wiki/EnumeratedString. 3-10 all mean 'the caster's own equipped weapon' (resolved client-side at cast), with 'slot' picking main/off/ranged/ammo; they carry no file, so build_data renders a per-slot marker pill. 8/9/10 are 3/4/5 again 'ignore disarmed' (a visibility rule, same slot); 6/7 are basic/preferred ammo (same slot). 'handler' names the build_data model bucket for 0/1/2.
